data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Netflix uses a microservices architecture to handle scaling millions of users and various functionality.
data.technical_spec: Decoupled services with RESTful APIs for inter-service communication.

data.title: Reactive Systems
data.description: System built to be responsive, resilient, elastic, and message-driven to handle dynamic loads.

data.title: Global CDN Deployment
data.description: Content Delivery Network to cache and deliver content to users globally for fast streaming.
data.technical_spec: Implementation with Open Connect, a custom CDN solution.

data.title: NoSQL Databases
data.description: Use of highly scalable databases to store diverse and large datasets.
data.technical_spec: Primarily uses Cassandra for horizontal scalability.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Distributing network or application traffic across multiple servers to ensure reliability.
data.technical_spec: Features Elastic Load Balancing and own mechanisms for traffic management.
